lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and extensive wear on both the interior and exterior. It requires major repairs to be fully operational.
Good condition.
The car is in good condition. The exterior has some minor surface scratches but no major dents. The interior is well-maintained with light wear. All mechanical systems are fully functional.

This vehicle is in solid, good condition and has been consistently well-maintained over the years. The exterior paint presents well with a nice shine, though it does have some typical minor wear, including a few small stone chips on the hood and light surface scratches consistent with its age. Inside, the cabin is clean and comfortable; the upholstery is in good shape with no major tears, though there is some light wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is sound, runs smoothly, and all major systems are functioning as they should. It’s a reliable choice for anyone looking for a well-kept vehicle that is ready for the road.

Get ready to drive home a dependable vehicle that’s ready for its next adventure! This car has been a reliable companion and still has plenty of life left in it. While it shows some honest wear and tear from its time on the road, it remains a solid, functional choice for anyone looking for a great value. It’s the perfect opportunity to get behind the wheel of a quality brand at a budget-friendly price!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. The exterior has significant rust on the rocker panels, a cracked windshield, and several large dents along the passenger side. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with multiple tears in the fabric and some non-functional electronics, including the radio and air conditioning. Mechanically, the engine runs but has a consistent oil leak and the transmission shifts roughly between gears. This car would be best suited as a project vehicle for a dedicated hobbyist or as a source for parts.

Presented in impeccable, showroom-state condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. Every detail has been preserved to an exacting standard, offering a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity that rivals a new delivery. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a definitive example of automotive excellence, curated for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You've got to see this absolute beauty! It’s in seriously stunning shape—honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like a dream. If you're looking for something that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of BMW’s S54-powered masterpiece. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six delivers linear power through individual throttle bodies, paired with a precise 6-speed manual Getrag gearbox. This chassis features documented subframe reinforcement, a complete VANOS bulletproofing, and recent rod bearing prophylaxis. Performance is sharpened by a limited-slip differential and a meticulously maintained suspension utilizing OEM+ components for optimal damping and turn-in. Mechanically flawless with a pristine undercarriage, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of high-revving atmospheric engineering, free of any parasitic loss or fluid seepage.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Spotless interior. Full maintenance records included. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is the definition of showroom perfection. Meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, glass-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh condition; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear, and every electronic feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it is indistinguishable from a new car, with a comprehensive service history and incredibly low mileage. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that has been pampered since day one. No stone has been left unturned in its upkeep, making it a true turn-key masterpiece for the most discerning enthusiast.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and uncompromising mechanical integrity, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every detail reflects meticulous stewardship, ensuring an ownership experience that mirrors a factory-new acquisition.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a level of care that borders on the fastidious. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine asset.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to show you this absolute beauty. It’s in truly pristine, showroom-level condition and has been treated with so much love—it's basically like driving a brand new car! You won't find a single scratch or hiccup here. I’m looking for a great new home for it, so come check it out and fall in love just like I did!

This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a specimen of peerless mechanical and aesthetic integrity.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so excited to share this absolute gem with you. This car is in truly incredible, pristine condition—it looks and feels like it just left the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like a dream. If you’re looking for something that’s basically brand new without the dealership hassle, this is the one for you. This 2021 Porsche 718 Cayman is the definition of showroom excellence. Finished in a stunning Jet Black Metallic, the exterior is absolutely flawless—no stone chips, scratches, or door dings to be found. It has been professionally ceramic coated and strictly garage-kept under a soft cover since purchase. Inside, the premium leather interior remains in 'as-new' condition; the seats show zero bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and the cabin still retains that distinctive new-car scent. Every electronic feature, from the infotainment system to the driver-assist sensors

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that places it in a category of its own. This unit remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine, smoke-free interior that retains its original luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from a new model. For the discerning buyer seeking an investment-grade example, this vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its lineage.
